articles.title: Conor McGregor Vows Another Comeback, UFC 329 Numbers, Weekend Preview, More | The Craic | 7/17/26
articles.description: The Craic is back, as Petesy Carroll and Chuck Mindenhall regale Ben Fowlkes with tales from Las Vegas. The lads sift through the fallout from UFC 329, including Conor McGregor vowing another comeback, the event's streaming numbers, and more. Plus, they look ahead to a loaded weekend that includes UFC OKC, PFL Austin, and RAF 11. 0:00 – INTRO 7:19 – Did UFC 329 Officially End the Conor McGregor Era? 12:02 – Will Conor McGregor Ever Fight Again? 16:12 – UFC 329's Massive Numbers: Did Conor Deliver? 20:19 – Conor's Viral Tweets & Why He Wants the Fight Ruled a No Contest 32:53 – Paramount Reveals UFC's Real Goal (It's Not TV Ratings) 34:40 – Can the UFC Sell Another Conor McGregor Comeback? 43:37 – Kamaru Usman vs. Dricus Du Plessis Preview & Title Picture 51:50 – Is Paddy Pimblett the UFC's Next Global Superstar? 1:02:04 – Weekend Fight Picks & Final Predictions UNCROWNED - Powered by Ariel and Yahoo!
